g.text: Objects solved this by attaching names directly to the data:
DOUBT - why not use is-premium-member as user key instead of "is-premium-member" ?
DOUBT - Why user["username"] and not user[username] ?
Because JS treats - as an subtraction operator,
Hence it will give SyntaxError: Unexpected token '-'
Because bracket notation was invented for dynamic property access,
Using user[username] means there exists an variable username ,
But using user["username"] means the username here is a key
Hence here we can access values using variables too
Both pointing to the same object
Obj1 and diff_copy3 are pointing to a same object
